penalties.description: Cut deviations from the marked circle line visible during cutting sequence.

consensus_score.reasoning: Both models agreed on timing and task completion with all phases detected. Claude identified 3 line deviations while GPT-4o identified 1. Given both models observed deviations but disagreed on count, consensus uses intermediate penalty of 2 deviations (10 points) as both models confirmed visible deviations occurred during the cutting sequence.

disagreements.rationale: Both models confirmed line deviations occurred but disagreed on count. Without frame-by-frame analysis capability, used intermediate value between the two assessments as both models provided specific evidence of deviations.
